name: Balboa Park Station / Green Yard
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: Minutes
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Municipal Transportation Agency. Board of Directors,San Francisco (Calif.). Parking Authority
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: MTA board minutes accepting the $702,921.38 Curtis E. Green Light Rail Center emergency switch-replacement contract and funding Balboa Park Station public-access improvements.

documents.title: Balboa Park Station pedestrian and bicycle connection project : executive summary
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Municipal Transportation Agency,California. Metropolitan Transportation Commission,Bay Area Toll Authority (Calif.),Safe Routes to Transit
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: The SFMTA's 2009 Balboa Park Station pedestrian and bicycle connection project, aimed at improving walking and cycling access around the Geneva Division streetcar depot.

documents.title: Balboa Park station area plan : public review draft
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Planning Dept
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: The 2002 public-review draft of the Balboa Park Station Area Plan, a Better Neighborhoods effort to remake the station into a transit hub.

documents.title: Notice of meeting and calendar
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Municipal Transportation Agency. Board of Directors,San Francisco (Calif.). Parking Authority
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: An MTA board calendar authorizing Contract No. 1249 for Green Light Rail Center track replacement (up to $31,197,197) and discussing sale of the Green Division's Upper Yard.

documents.title: Calendar : meeting of Budget Committee, Board of Supervisors, City and County of San Francisco
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Board of Supervisors. Budget Committee
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1994 Budget Committee memo identifying the Green Light Rail Center at 425 Geneva Street as the primary LRV storage site, with room for a maximum of 142 vehicles.
